Flat concept inventory:
- LLM role-playing and LLM personalization | papers: ff2cd36f552bd1358aa729ab5dbea5d0894b919f; 9ba152acedd481ed84d0de8b45ddbffaaadac814; 97717368b5f7e6a544f0a1c73a441bdcb4b6a046; f2f2339f320df0021825a3160cfbc027cb442d13; a8b631ecb23dc891d5ee731eb3ca2204e0363d35; 9ae17b09c59f06f02ef824b856a440de663471d0; c0e36c42bb7c70d64e4fe3b736ae1944210accdc; 298a68153859303ee70b3ef1525ee9c7031e32f5; 6dd3c9f05b319693cb30f700e2f1f128cded7c6f; 6c7046195f64cccac1ed3275d88d77655534b5a4; f4a5503783487eba5c5e34b1d02c09016b244b1d; d948b7c90556ba4409f480532ad888d12b8f2d08; b0435af3063195e8ae880489e64ccde64e6d7563; 674b6321ae1d12c83f28ade1850a27256c20f0d4; a01976ed98daf466541c8fea07d82ef4c852eb22; a8aef5a15dc2b486b3bf01205d2687a1140a41bb; b875206981c6c0a10e84f77d2c48cb7fc57fbfe6; c189ee5794fc966a637154478d985d92da040306; 301e4ba731b703313ef24c1b6e95e9c0bc05a7dd; c8996f183b883f4a16c05b4eaff2b892fb6bf57d; 7f212f04edd558d0b81930d11022d1df57b6a0d8; 00a765760e75bcc4e28c339b575a70f1d3bdcc5e; 6c28d6c3eddf63e7bc096361d1ab14b4637181af; 3b10497e5609d593b6a7035d7ed65890a3e6d13d; - LLM Personality Evaluation | papers: ff2cd36f552bd1358aa729ab5dbea5d0894b919f; 9ba152acedd481ed84d0de8b45ddbffaaadac814; 97717368b5f7e6a544f0a1c73a441bdcb4b6a046; f2f2339f320df0021825a3160cfbc027cb442d13; a8b631ecb23dc891d5ee731eb3ca2204e0363d35

- LLM Personalization | papers: 9ae17b09c59f06f02ef824b856a440de663471d0; c0e36c42bb7c70d64e4fe3b736ae1944210accdc; 298a68153859303ee70b3ef1525ee9c7031e32f5; 6dd3c9f05b319693cb30f700e2f1f128cded7c6f; 6c7046195f64cccac1ed3275d88d77655534b5a4; f4a5503783487eba5c5e34b1d02c09016b244b1d; d948b7c90556ba4409f480532ad888d12b8f2d08; b0435af3063195e8ae880489e64ccde64e6d7563; 674b6321ae1d12c83f28ade1850a27256c20f0d4; a01976ed98daf466541c8fea07d82ef4c852eb22; a8aef5a15dc2b486b3bf01205d2687a1140a41bb; b875206981c6c0a10e84f77d2c48cb7fc57fbfe6; c189ee5794fc966a637154478d985d92da040306; 301e4ba731b703313ef24c1b6e95e9c0bc05a7dd; 4a7f6c4e71e20311ade4e76e8d0945d499c31fcd; a8842ff234dc4ca8d418b98221f529156c1abbf1; c2f9006993d9d84d48eb894aab3ba60f946d0e15; 30334d9ef3d07b83dc20bdcf0456763653eeecfd; a1657fcbebeb1136bda71079b17ec117dc895329; c8996f183b883f4a16c05b4eaff2b892fb6bf57d; 7f212f04edd558d0b81930d11022d1df57b6a0d8; 00a765760e75bcc4e28c339b575a70f1d3bdcc5e; 6c28d6c3eddf63e7bc096361d1ab14b4637181af; 3b10497e5609d593b6a7035d7ed65890a3e6d13d; a19193ef534619654d3252d4034ef154407562dc; 450b5490cc653478c272be50aa986798df828a20; f834aed32f5531bfa426faab71878c549572500e; 276ebc620a8976026bd2d03582b9ecfa3738d43c; ef0679f8b3114c339bdf5a0c202403a08d160a88; 60f8a7ac53585aa2c173219e97507d6d963864e7; af067c6f1c12941625e4c3b49b002c7c7c0b2542
